mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, A.* FROM ( SELECT C.COMPANY_NUMBER, C.COMPANY_NAME, C.COMPANY_ADDRESS, C.COMPANY_STATE, CI.COMP_SUMMARY, NVL(CI.COMP_IMAGE_PATH, F.FILE_PATH) AS FILE_PATH, CI.COMP_PAGE_DATE, JP.CAT1_IS_HIRING, JP.CAT2_IS_HIRING, JP.CAT3_IS_HIRING, JP.CAT4_IS_HIRING FROM TBL_COMPANY C LEFT JOIN TBL_COMP_INFO CI ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = CI.COMPANY_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_FILE F ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = F.COMPANY_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_JOB_POST JP ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = JP.COMPANY_NUMBER ORDER BY C.COMPANY_NUMBER DESC ) A ) WHERE RNUM BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT C.COMPANY_NUMBER, C.COMPANY_NAME, C.COMPANY_ADDRESS, C.COMPANY_STATE, C.COMPANY_BRN, NVL(CI.COMP_IMAGE_PATH, F.FILE_PATH) AS FILE_PATH, CI.COMP_CEO_NAME, CI.COMP_FND_YEAR, CI.COMP_EMPL_CNT, CI.COMP_REV, CI.COMP_CAP, CI.COMP_TYPE, CI.COMP_SUMMARY, CI.COMP_TECH, CI.COMP_MAIN_BIZ, CI.COMP_INFO, CI.COMP_SVC_HIST, JP.JOB_POST_PROFILE, JP.JOB_POST_CONTENT, JP.JOB_POST_PROCESS, JP.JOB_POST_METHOD, JP.JOB_POST_DATE, JP.CAT1_IS_HIRING, JP.CAT2_IS_HIRING, JP.CAT3_IS_HIRING, JP.CAT4_IS_HIRING FROM TBL_COMPANY C LEFT JOIN TBL_COMP_INFO CI ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = CI.COMPANY_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_FILE F ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = F.COMPANY_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_JOB_POST JP ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = JP.COMPANY_NUMBER WHERE C.COMPANY_NUMBER = #{companyNumber}
